title: Private's Skies
description: Semi-realistic and fantasy resource pack that changes sky colors of many biomes.
body:
# Private's Skies

A resource pack that overhauls sky and fog colors in many biomes, in a semi-realistic and fantasy style.

This resource pack requires the mod [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) to work, as it will not work without the mod installed.

## Credits

[Vibrant Fog](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vibrant-fog) (formerly Vibrant Sky) - The main inspiration of this pack

[Fogulous](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fogulous) - The main inspiration for the fog effects

If you find any issues in this resource pack, please report your issues on [GitHub](https://github.com/PrivateYT-AG/privates-skies/issues).

## License

This resource pack is licensed under the MIT license.
